title: After Enies Lobby: Key Exchange
description: In the Post-Enies Lobby storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #8, Blackbeard, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #11 as the scene develops across pages 9–12.
scene: This scene advances the Post-Enies Lobby conflict through Unknown person #5, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #8, Blackbeard, Unknown person #3, focusing on the immediate stakes of after enies lobby: key exchange.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: And I'll become the pirate King !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: As long as you don't regret it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Whitebeard... I've... gone through many battles

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: this... isn't a wound from an adventure.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Nor did I get it from Hawkeye...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What do you want me to do?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That's what you came here for, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That's the only wish I have.

dialogue.speaker: Blackbeard
dialogue.text: You can't live in this world

summary: This scene advances the Post-Enies Lobby conflict through Unknown person #5, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #8, Blackbeard, Unknown person #3, focusing on the immediate stakes of after enies lobby: key exchange.
